message:
feat(freeze): enable frozen function dispatch with name@line_num keys

Enable the frozen function dispatch that was previously disabled. The key
fix is using name@line_num format for dispatch keys to match QuickJS's
internal dispatch mechanism (quickjs.c:16598).

Changes:
- module_parser.zig: Extract line_num from bytecode debug info
- frozen_registry.zig: Register functions with name@line_num format
- native_dispatch.zig: Enable dispatch lookup, fix u64->usize for WASM
- zig_codegen_full.zig: Remove overly aggressive goto checks that blocked
  legitimate loop functions from being frozen

Benchmark results (vs Bun):
- fib(45): 2860ms vs 4289ms (1.50x faster)
- loop: 45ms vs 371ms (8.2x faster)
- typed_array: 45ms vs 372ms (8.2x faster)
- tail_recursive: 89ms vs 40813ms (457x faster)
